strategic_direction.title: Aggressive Pivot to Meta Lead Gen
strategic_direction.reasoning: Google and Bing costs are rising for HVAC. Since Brendan is currently recording video creative, we need to finalize the campaign structure now to launch immediately once videos are ready.

strategic_direction.reasoning: The Home Show on April 10 is a goldmine for 'social proof' content. We need to ensure the video interview strategy is clear so the client captures usable footage for the Meta ads we're building.

Confirm owners for new items and set deadlines for Home Show content delivery.

projected_roadmap.title: Meta Ad-Specific Landing Page
projected_roadmap.what: Creation of a high-converting, mobile-optimized landing page specifically for the Meta Lead Gen campaign. This includes lead capture forms that sync directly to the CRM and mirrors the ad messaging for HVAC installs.
projected_roadmap.why_now: We are currently launching Meta ads (Set up Meta lead generation campaign), but the client has a 'website' service gap. Sending paid social traffic to a generic homepage will bleed budget; a dedicated landing page ensures we maximize the ROI of the new video ads.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 5 hours: Wireframe, design, and technical integration with CRM.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: 1 hour: Review and approval of copy and design.
projected_roadmap.prerequisites: Meta Lead Gen campaign structure finalized.
projected_roadmap.impact: Expected to increase lead conversion rates by 20-30% compared to standard website traffic, ensuring the pivot from Bing/Google is profitable.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: Brendan, since we're pivoting budget to Meta and you're putting in the work to record those videos, I want to make sure that traffic actually converts. Instead of just sending them to the main site, I'd like to build a dedicated landing page specifically for these HVAC install leads so we don't waste a single click.

projected_roadmap.title: Automated Recruitment 'Quick-Apply' Workflow
projected_roadmap.what: Building an automated sequence for the 'Hiring P.S.' mentioned in the March 19th meeting. When someone clicks the hiring link, they get an automated text/email with a basic screening questionnaire, and the team gets an internal notification.
projected_roadmap.why_now: Recruitment was a major theme in the last huddle. We've already agreed to add the 'Hiring P.S.' to emails, but without an automated follow-up, the client will struggle to manage the influx of interest manually.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 3 hours: Workflow build, email/SMS template creation, and notification triggers.
projected_roadmap.prerequisites: Add hiring P.S. to April content emails.
projected_roadmap.impact: Reduces time-to-hire by automating the initial screening phase and ensures no technician candidate falls through the cracks.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: We're starting to push the hiring message in our emails now, but I want to make sure the back-end is ready. I'm proposing we set up an automated 'Quick-Apply' workflow so when a tech shows interest, they get an immediate text to start the screening process while they're still hot.

projected_roadmap.title: Summer AC Tune-Up Campaign Launch
projected_roadmap.what: A multi-channel campaign (Email + SMS + Meta) focused on 'Summer Readiness' AC tune-ups. This includes a 3-part email series and a targeted re-engagement list for customers who haven't had service in 12+ months.
projected_roadmap.why_now: It's late March. In the home services industry, the window for pre-summer preventative maintenance is opening. We need to secure the schedule before the peak heat hits and the team is stuck in emergency-only mode.
projected_roadmap.effort_b3x: 6 hours: Segmenting the CRM list, drafting 3 emails, and setting up the tracking numbers.
projected_roadmap.effort_client: 1 hour: Confirming the 'Early Bird' offer or discount.
projected_roadmap.impact: Increases service volume in the pre-peak season, ensuring steady revenue and early customer acquisition before competitors start their summer push.
projected_roadmap.pitch_script: It's already almost April, and you know how crazy it gets once the heat hits. I want to get ahead of the curve and launch a 'Summer Readiness' campaign now to fill your calendar with tune-ups before the emergency calls take over the schedule.

talking_points.Record Meta ad videos: Brendan, how's the video recording coming along for the Meta ads? I'm excited to see those scripts come to life.
talking_points.Add hiring P.S. to April content emails: I'm working on getting that hiring P.S. added to the April emails—it's a little behind our original March 20th target, so I'm prioritizing that for you today.
talking_points.Gather before/after photos for Google Pr: Cara, quick check-in—have you had a chance to grab those project photos for the Google Business Profile? It’s a huge trust builder for people finding you on Search.
talking_points.Investigate Bing lead drop: Good news on the Bing investigation—we've identified the drop and accounted for it in our performance numbers for March.
talking_points.Meta Ad-Specific Landing Page: Since we're moving budget into Meta, I'd like to build a specific landing page for those ads. It will make sure we’re turning as many of those clicks into actual leads as possible.
talking_points.Execute video interview strategy at Apri: With the Home Show coming up on the 10th, do you feel ready to grab those interviews, or should we do a quick 5-minute review of the 'shot list' today?
talking_points.Review CEO Blueprint and Checklist: Brendan, did you get a chance to look over that CEO Blueprint? I'd love to hear your thoughts on how that checklist fits your current workflow.
